title: DLS: Report a Public Worksite Accident
description: MA Department of Labor Standards page explaining how public-sector employers/employees report worksite accidents, injuries, and fatalities to the DLS Workplace Safety and Health Program — who qualifies as a public employee, which incidents require immediate reporting (amputations, loss of eye, hospitalization, fatalities), and the three reporting channels (phone, email, online SafetyWorks form).
notes: DEADLINE: serious incidents (amputation, loss of eye, hospitalization, fatality) require IMMEDIATE reporting. Phone (508) 616-0461 ext. 9488; email safepublicworkplace@state.ma.us; or the SafetyWorks online form.
